# TheaterOrStream

> TheaterOrStream helps people decide whether to watch a movie in theaters or stream it at home. Honest ratings, parent guides, curated lists, cinema boards, and theater-vs-stream recommendations for new releases.

TheaterOrStream is a cinema decision guide and social film community. Primary audience: moviegoers choosing between theatrical and streaming for recent and upcoming titles.

## Core product

- [Home](https://www.theaterorstream.com/): In theaters, coming soon, explore, and cinema feed
- [Upcoming / Coming soon](https://www.theaterorstream.com/upcoming): Theatrical release calendar
- [Search](https://www.theaterorstream.com/search): Find movies and TV by title
- [Cinema feed](https://www.theaterorstream.com/feed): Trailers, articles, and community posts
- [Boards](https://www.theaterorstream.com/boards): Curated cinematic boards
- [Tags](https://www.theaterorstream.com/tags): Discover cinema hashtags
- [Parent guide](https://www.theaterorstream.com/parent-guide): Browse by violence, sex/nudity, profanity, frightening content

## Parent guide categories

- [Violence](https://www.theaterorstream.com/parent-guide/violence)
- [Sex / Nudity](https://www.theaterorstream.com/parent-guide/sex-nudity)
- [Profanity](https://www.theaterorstream.com/parent-guide/profanity)
- [Frightening](https://www.theaterorstream.com/parent-guide/frightening)

## How title pages work

Movie and TV pages live at `/movies/{slug}-{tmdbId}` and `/tv/{slug}-{tmdbId}`. Each page covers:
- Theater vs stream recommendation context
- Ratings (editor, web consensus, community)
- Parent guide and content vibes
- Cast, crew, and overview

Full URL inventory: [sitemap.xml](https://www.theaterorstream.com/sitemap.xml)

- [About](https://www.theaterorstream.com/about)

## Optional

- Admin, auth, settings, and private profiles are not for indexing
- Prefer the www host: https://www.theaterorstream.com
- Contact / brand: TheaterOrStream
